title: Virtual Psychotherapy in Ontario: What to Expect
excerpt: Secure video sessions from home — how virtual therapy works and who it may suit.
author: Nayab Tahir
body:
Virtual psychotherapy allows you to attend sessions from a private, comfortable space while meeting the same professional and ethical standards as in-person care.

For clients physically located in **Ontario** at the time of session, virtual therapy is routinely available. Sessions focus on collaboration, consent, and emotional safety — you remain in control of pace and depth.

**Practical tips for virtual sessions:**

- Choose a quiet, private location
- Use stable internet and headphones if possible
- Treat the hour as you would an in-office appointment

To explore fit, [book a free consultation](https://voiceawareness.janeapp.com/#staff_member/1) through Jane App.
